internal_issues.description: SEC-3.2 eclipse prediction range stale. Section says '-17 to -21 nT' but dome uses 9-station dual-baseline system.
SEC-3.2: E-PRED-B (Hartland > Ebro despite lower coverage) completely absent from our analysis.
SEC-3.2 claims dome 'applied correction factor of 1.672' but 1.672 is KAPPA, not eclipse FSF.
8 WINs have unsynced code_analysis tags (59/67 synced).
SEC-3.1 Live Power page content not archived to raw-text/.
internal_issues.recommended_action: DEFERRED: Requires poller to capture the dome's Live Power page HTML and archive to raw-text/. The page URL should be on john09289.github.io/predictions under the Live Power tab. Flag for poller enhancement.

internal_issues.description: WIN-003 picks 117 Hz without noting Reid's other measurements (125 Hz room, 121 Hz refined).
Chapman 1933 citation overstates exact signal magnitude prediction.
2.66 area ratio called coincidence without verification or explanation of origin.
Bermuda rebuttal shallow — doesn't address geometric/geomagnetic symmetry claim. Also missing 'Lloyd's of London' subject.

recommended_actions.action: Apply SEC-3.2 patches (ISS-082, ISS-083, ISS-084) — these fix a factual error (wrong correction factor), stale prediction range, and missing engagement with E-PRED-B. SEC-3.2 is the eclipse analysis section, our most visible and time-sensitive content.
Apply WIN-054 El Gordo patch from previous run (ISS-055, critical). Verify verdict change from 'Misleading' to appropriate category.
Run code_analysis sync: node build-scripts/sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace . (closes ISS-048, syncs remaining 8 WINs)
Apply moderate patches for WIN-003, WIN-010, WIN-019, WIN-028 (ISS-077, ISS-022, ISS-016, ISS-020)
Archive Live Power page content for SEC-3.1 verifiability (ISS-074). Enhance poller to capture the page.
